message:
bd-3bxhj.1.7: E2E contract gate script with structured JSONL logging

10 E2E tests validating the full contract validation pipeline:
- Green-path: 6-stage pipeline (load, manifest, clauses, policy, confidence, licensing)
- Red-paths: broken hash chain, blocked license, accept-with-failures, low confidence, broken provenance, missing provenance stage
- JSONL trace well-formedness verification
- Report determinism across identical runs
- Cross-contract consistency checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
